tasks.label: ensure dev server (5173)
tasks.command: $port = 5173; $listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $listener) { Start-Process -FilePath 'npm.cmd' -ArgumentList 'run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort' -WorkingDirectory '${workspaceFolder}' -WindowStyle Hidden }; $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds(20); do { $listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($listener) { Write-Host 'Vite is listening on http://127.0.0.1:5173/'; exit 0 }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 250 } while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline); throw 'Timed out waiting for Vite on http://127.0.0.1:5173/'
